name: Biblins Bridge & Lady Park Wood
terrain: Riverside path, bouncy suspension bridge, woodland
highlights: Thrill of the 'wobbly' Biblins suspension bridge plus ancient oak wood pioneered by researchers.
points_of_interest: Biblins Suspension Bridge (1957, rebuilt 2015); Lady Park Wood reserve
viewpoints: Wye gorge views from bridge; Great Doward cliffs opposite
parking_start: Biblins or Symonds Yat West car park
food_drink_nearby: Olde Ferrie Inn; Garden of Siam; Hillersland Inn
hazards_notes: Bridge sways — only 6 people at a time; cattle in Lady Park Wood meadows
